instruction: Evaluate the double integral: integral from {y1} to {y2} integral from {x1} to {x2} of {c} dx dy.
steps: Inner integral: integral from {x1} to {x2} of {c} dx = {c}·({x2}-{x1}) = {c}·{dx}.
Outer integral: integral from {y1} to {y2} of {c}·{dx} dy = {c}·{dx}·({y2}-{y1}) = {answer_double_int230}.
